**WHO'S THE DATE LADY?**  
SHE'S THE DATE AFICIONADO, AND SHE KEEPS HER INGREDIENTS PURE AND SIMPLE. YOU CAN COUNT ON EVERY PRODUCT SHE BRINGS TO YOUR TABLE TO TASTE GREAT AND INCLUDE ONLY MINIMAL, HIGH-QUALITY INGREDIENTS.

**WHAT'CHA GONNA DO WITH DATE SUGAR?**  
DITCH THE CANE SUGAR, AND PUT IT IN YOUR COOKIES. SCATTER YOUR SCONES WITH IT. SPRINKLE IT ON YOUR OATMEAL WITH TOASTED NUTS AND DRIED CRANBERRIES - GOOD MORNING! ENJOY THE NOVELTY OF IT. DRIED DATES, CRUSHED JUST FOR YOU.

**DATE SUGAR METER:**  
*WHEN YOU CAN NO LONGER SEE DATE SUGAR, IT'S TIME TO START READING THE LABEL. IT'S NOT ALWAYS WHAT YOU THINK.*

---
